title: National Public Service Week: Serving Canadians Better Act
title_en: National Public Service Week: Serving Canadians Better Act
description: National Public Service Week: Serving Canadians Better Act (National Public Service Week: Serving...). Current to 2026-02-04.

provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content: 1 This Act may be cited as the National Public Service Week: Serving Canadians Better Act .

provisions.title: National Public Service Week
provisions.content: 2 (1) Throughout Canada, in each and every year, the third week of the month of June shall be known as the "National Public Service Week". (2) For the purposes of this section, third week means the period ending the third Saturday of the month and beginning the previous Sunday.
